label: Transparent mangrove motif source
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a mangrove roots motif, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A compact cluster of mangrove prop roots with root-brown trunks, tangled branching root geometry, wet silt attached to the roots, brackish teal water hints at the base, and a few small glossy leaf-green canopy sprigs. Accurate mangrove form, natural bark texture, humid coastal wetland material detail, resilient logistics-system mood.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop roots, silt, water hints, or leaf tips.
Lighting/mood: clean diffuse studio light that preserves natural root brown, brackish teal, leaf green, and wetland neutrals.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, horizon, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff or any magenta/pink tones anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no animals, no boats, no people, no landscape, no decorative background, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection outside the subject, no text, no watermark.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Mangrove", derived from the previously generated transparent mangrove roots motif: root-brown prop roots, brackish teal channels, leaf-green accents, wet silt neutrals, and branching logistics geometry.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from root brown, brackish teal, leaf green, silt paper, wetland mist, mud gold, and branching mangrove root structure. This light board is the primary reference for coding future theme files.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, ultra high resolution, 4K-class source asset, crisp product-design presentation.
Resolution and legibility: use large readable labels, generous section spacing, high contrast text, no dense tiny tables. Every label should be clean and readable at gallery preview size.
Required visible sections with exact section labels: Morphous Mangrove, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English examples using Geist guidance and Japanese examples using Noto Sans JP guidance; include visible labels such as Heading, Body, Label, Metric, 見出し, 本文, ラベル, 数値.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command palette/search, sidebar navigation, logistics metric cards, route chart, inventory/status chart, empty state, loading state, error state, spacing scale, radius token, border token, shadow token, subtle mangrove-root texture samples.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-compatible product design system, precise grid, 8px card radius, restrained operational logistics dashboard mood, branching root dividers, channel-like navigation, tactile wetland paper surfaces.
Color palette: use only motif-derived root brown, brackish teal, leaf green, mud gold, silt paper, wetland mist, drift silt, tidal ink, and root-channel dark neutrals.
Text: use short readable UI labels only; spell "Morphous Mangrove" exactly.
Constraints: no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no stock marketing hero, no watermark, no random brand names, no illegible microtext, no misspelling of "Morphous Mangrove".

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode version of the visible Morphous Mangrove design-system board. It must feel like the same system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the visible transparent mangrove roots motif and the visible light-mode Morphous Mangrove board as references. Preserve the root-brown structure, brackish teal channels, leaf-green status language, mud-gold warnings, branching mangrove-root dividers, spacing, Japanese typography, and shadcn/tweakcn component coverage. This dark board is the companion reference for coding future theme files.
Canvas: wide landscape board, 16:9 feel, ultra high resolution, crisp product-design presentation.
Resolution and legibility: use large readable labels, generous section spacing, high contrast text, no dense tiny tables. Every label should be clean and readable at gallery preview size.
Required visible sections with exact section labels: Morphous Mangrove, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English examples using Geist guidance and Japanese examples using Noto Sans JP guidance; include visible labels such as Heading, Body, Label, Metric, 見出し, 本文, ラベル, 数値.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command palette/search, sidebar navigation, logistics metric cards, route chart, inventory/status chart, empty state, loading state, error state, spacing scale, radius token, border token, shadow token, subtle mangrove-root texture samples.
Visual details: tidal-ink dark background, root-channel deep cards, wetland-mist readable text, brackish-teal primary actions and rings, root-brown structural surfaces, leaf-green confirmations, mud-gold caution states, subtle brackish-water and root-bark texture overlays, crisp controls.
Text: use short readable UI labels only; spell "Morphous Mangrove" exactly.
Constraints: no neon colors, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple gradients, no flat pure-black-only background, no stock marketing hero, no watermark, no random brand names, no illegible microtext, no misspelling of "Morphous Mangrove".
